title: Airbnb Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: The 28 analysts covering Airbnb stock have a consensus rating of Buy with an average price target of $149.29, forecasting a 21.28% increase in stock price over the next year. Airbnb has a consensus rating of Moderate Buy based on 19 buy ratings, 12 hold ratings and 1 sell rating. Following recent earnings, analysts lifted their price targets, with the consensus price target rising 5.5% to US$156. The most bullish analyst values Airbnb at US$181 per share, while the most bearish prices it at US$110. The consensus forecast from Airbnb's 39 analysts is for revenues of US$13.9b in 2026, reflecting a 10% improvement compared to the last 12 months, with per-share earnings expected to rise 19% to US$5.06. For 2027, analysts forecast EPS of $5.90, with the lowest forecast at $5.06 and the highest at $7.27. Airbnb is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 14% and 9.4% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow 15.6% per annum.
